##NAMES=Chalcocite
##RRUFFID=R120090
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Cu_2_S
##LOCALITY=Tsumeb, Namibia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Grey metallic hexagonal tablets associated with stottite R120089, siderite and tennantite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120090
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Cu_1.99_S
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 15.27 b: 11.901 c: 13.531 alpha: 90 beta: 116.37 gamma: 90 volume: 2203.2 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
